title: Upgrading from 4.016 to 4.024 introduces a verilation failure

features.name: wide unsized number literal exceeding implementation limit
features.description: Code should include a number literal with width exceeding 8191 bits to trigger the implementation limit

features.name: concatenation with very wide zero constant
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a wide zero constant (8191+ bits) with a signal
